labels.analysis: The MCP Server "ai.filegraph/document-processing" provides 8 tools for file management tasks.
labels.reasoning: Primary label "File Management" assigned based on tool names and descriptions.

tools.name: filegraph_api_overview
tools.description: API overview: authentication, rate limits, errors, and available endpoint groups.

tools.name: filegraph_text_extraction_docs
tools.description: Docs for /any/to-text, /any/info, /any/to-struct — extract text with smart format detection and ocr, analyze file metadata, extract structured data with LLM.

language.title: Language
language.description: Language for code examples (e.g. 'go_native', 'shell_curl'). Defaults to Python HTTPX.

endpoint.title: Endpoint
endpoint.description: Get docs for a single endpoint only (reduces response size). Valid values: /any/to-text, /any/info, /any/to-struct

tools.name: filegraph_pdf_operations_docs
tools.description: Docs for /pdf/to-text, /pdf/to-docx, /pdf/to-image, /pdf/merge, /pdf/split, /pdf/compress, /pdf/rotate, /pdf/encrypt, /pdf/decrypt — extract text with ocr, convert to docx/images, merge, split, compress, rotate, encrypt/decrypt.

language.title: Language
language.description: Language for code examples (e.g. 'go_native', 'shell_curl'). Defaults to Python HTTPX.

endpoint.title: Endpoint
endpoint.description: Get docs for a single endpoint only (reduces response size). Valid values: /pdf/to-text, /pdf/to-docx, /pdf/to-image, /pdf/merge, /pdf/split, /pdf/compress, /pdf/rotate, /pdf/encrypt, /pdf/decrypt

tools.name: filegraph_image_processing_docs
tools.description: Docs for /image/to-text, /image/to-pdf, /image/resize — extract text via ocr, convert images to pdf, resize images.

language.title: Language
language.description: Language for code examples (e.g. 'go_native', 'shell_curl'). Defaults to Python HTTPX.

endpoint.title: Endpoint
endpoint.description: Get docs for a single endpoint only (reduces response size). Valid values: /image/to-text, /image/to-pdf, /image/resize

tools.name: filegraph_audio_transcription_docs
tools.description: Docs for /audio/to-text — transcribe audio to text, detect language, apply smart formatting.

language.title: Language
language.description: Language for code examples (e.g. 'go_native', 'shell_curl'). Defaults to Python HTTPX.

endpoint.title: Endpoint
endpoint.description: Get docs for a single endpoint only (reduces response size). Valid values: /audio/to-text

tools.name: filegraph_office_documents_docs
tools.description: Docs for /docx/to-text, /docx/to-pdf, /xlsx/to-text, /xlsx/to-pdf, /xlsx/to-csv, /pptx/to-text, /pptx/to-pdf, /pptx/to-images — extract text/data, convert word/excel/powerpoint to pdf/csv/images.

language.title: Language
language.description: Language for code examples (e.g. 'go_native', 'shell_curl'). Defaults to Python HTTPX.

endpoint.title: Endpoint
endpoint.description: Get docs for a single endpoint only (reduces response size). Valid values: /docx/to-text, /docx/to-pdf, /xlsx/to-text, /xlsx/to-pdf, /xlsx/to-csv, /pptx/to-text, /pptx/to-pdf, /pptx/to-images

tools.name: filegraph_html_processing_docs
tools.description: Docs for /html/to-text, /html/to-pdf, /html/to-image — extract html text, render to pdf, capture html screenshots.

language.title: Language
language.description: Language for code examples (e.g. 'go_native', 'shell_curl'). Defaults to Python HTTPX.

endpoint.title: Endpoint
endpoint.description: Get docs for a single endpoint only (reduces response size). Valid values: /html/to-text, /html/to-pdf, /html/to-image

tools.name: filegraph_security_docs
tools.description: Docs for /security/pdf/redact, /security/text/redact, /security/pdf/lock, /security/pdf/unlock, /security/detect-tracking — redact sensitive pdf content, redact PII from extracted text, lock/unlock pdfs, detect/remove tracking pixels.

language.title: Language
language.description: Language for code examples (e.g. 'go_native', 'shell_curl'). Defaults to Python HTTPX.

endpoint.title: Endpoint
endpoint.description: Get docs for a single endpoint only (reduces response size). Valid values: /security/pdf/redact, /security/text/redact, /security/pdf/lock, /security/pdf/unlock, /security/detect-tracking
